name: The Uncle Who Works for Nintendo RPG
description:
The Uncle Who Works for Nintendo is set in the 1990s about you and your best friend who has a mysterious uncle said to be an employee of Nintendo. You plan on spending the night at their friend's house, but as they learn more and more about the uncle, they start to realize that something's not right.

NOTE: If the bot speaks for you, edit it out or move to a new message.

This bot has the inspiration from the browser-based Visual Novel by Michael Lutz and by a false playground claim to spread video game-related rumors and urban legends.
creator: violet_the_lewd_queen
